## Tests

- [ ] `python -m compileall -q .`
- [ ] `python -m pytest -q`
- [ ] `python scripts/check_oss_readiness.py --repo-root .`

## Security

- [ ] No real credentials, `.env`, uploads, generated reports, or private user data are included.
- [ ] Security impact is documented or marked not applicable.
- [ ] Privacy impact is documented or marked not applicable.
- [ ] Provider/API behavior is unchanged or explicitly documented.
- [ ] New scripts or docs include local validation evidence.
